chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Eclipses, Earthquakes, Winds, and Oppression and Their Causes

text: 1523 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «نِعْمَ اَلرِّيحُ اَلْجَنُوبُ تَكْسِرُ اَلْبَرْدَ عَنِ اَلْمَسَاكِينِ وَ تُلْقِحُ اَلشَّجَرَ وَ تُسِيلُ اَلْأَوْدِيَةَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1523 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The south wind (al-janub) is a blessing; it breaks the cold for the needy, pollinates the trees, and fills the valleys with water”.
